business_overview.description: The company operates in the agricultural sector, focusing on the production and distribution of corn, soybeans, and wheat. Its principal segments include North America and South America, with a significant geographic footprint across these regions.

extraction_notes: Company name not explicitly stated in the provided text.

risk_factors_top.title: Commodity price volatility
risk_factors_top.summary: The Company is exposed to risks associated with fluctuations in commodity prices, which can impact its financial performance.

risk_factors_top.title: Adverse weather conditions, including as a result of climate change
risk_factors_top.summary: Adverse weather conditions and climate change may impact agricultural commodity availability, quality, and pricing, affecting operations and supply chains.

risk_factors_top.title: Ongoing war between Russia and Ukraine
risk_factors_top.summary: The ongoing war could disrupt operations, cause property damage, and affect financial condition due to potential expropriation and loss of assets in Ukraine.

risk_factors_top.title: Economic conditions and global financial markets
risk_factors_top.summary: Weak global economic conditions and adverse financial market conditions may negatively affect the creditworthiness of lenders and counterparties, impacting our financial condition and results of operations.

risk_factors_top.title: Regulatory risks
risk_factors_top.summary: Changes in laws and regulations, including trade policies, environmental regulations, and tax laws, may impose additional costs and risks on the business.

risk_factors_top.title: Operational risks
risk_factors_top.summary: Acquisitions, divestitures, and joint ventures pose risks such as integration challenges, unexpected delays, and potential liabilities from successor or indemnity obligations.

risk_factors_top.title: Reputational risk
risk_factors_top.summary: The failure to maintain high standards for quality, safety, integrity, environmental sustainability and social responsibility can lead to reduced demand for products, operational disruptions, increased costs, and loss of market share.

risk_factors_top.title: Regulatory risk
risk_factors_top.summary: Compliance with numerous global laws and regulations related to taxes, accounting, anti-corruption, trade sanctions, product safety, environmental matters, and facility licensing can result in fines, shutdowns, and other liabilities.

risk_factors_top.title: Environmental risk
risk_factors_top.summary: Operations are subject to environmental regulations that could lead to significant costs or liabilities for past operations and potential restrictions on industrial activities due to climate change and conservation efforts.

risk_factors_top.title: Cybersecurity incidents
risk_factors_top.summary: The company faces significant risks related to cybersecurity, including potential security breaches and cyber-based attacks that could disrupt operations and result in financial losses. The company's efforts to mitigate these risks may not be sufficient.

risk_factors_top.title: Tax law changes and exposure to additional tax liabilities
risk_factors_top.summary: Changes in tax laws or exposure to additional tax liabilities, particularly related to the BEPS initiative and potential windfall profit taxes, could have a material impact on the company's financial condition and results of operations.

risk_factors_top.title: Third-party dependencies
risk_factors_top.summary: The success of the company's supply chain relies heavily on third parties, which may fail to perform due to various factors. This could lead to manufacturing challenges, shipment delays, increased costs, or lost revenue.

risk_factors_top.title: Public health crises and pandemics
risk_factors_top.summary: Public health crises, such as the COVID-19 pandemic, can significantly impact operations, facilities, employee health, supply chain, and customer base. The extent of the impact is difficult to predict.

risk_factors_top.title: Executive management and key personnel risks
risk_factors_top.summary: The loss of executive management or other key personnel could have a significant adverse impact on operations and future profitability, especially given current labor market dynamics. Swiss law also restricts the company's ability to provide certain severance payments.

risk_factors_top.title: Anti-takeover provisions
risk_factors_top.summary: The company has anti-takeover provisions in its Articles of Association that could make it more difficult for a third party to acquire the company, potentially limiting shareholders' ability to obtain a premium for their shares.

risk_factors_top.title: Integration risks
risk_factors_top.summary: Risks associated with integrating Bunge and Viterra's businesses, including potential loss of key staff, disruption of operations, higher than expected integration costs, and delays in realizing anticipated synergies.

segments.name: Agribusiness
key_drivers: Higher Gross profit in Europe softseed business, global soybean oilseed processing businesses, and North America oilseed processing business
key_concerns: Lower volumes in Argentina due to drought
Decreased sales prices in almost all regions for global soybean oilseed processing businesses and Europe softseed business
products_services: Processing of soybeans, corn, wheat, and other agricultural commodities

segments.name: Refined and Specialty Oils
key_concerns: Lower average sales prices and volumes in most regions
Partial expiration of leased capacity at the Rotterdam facility
products_services: Refining and processing of vegetable oils, animal fats, and other specialty oils

segments.name: Milling
key_drivers: Higher prices in South American wheat milling business
key_concerns: Lower volumes due to sale of Mexican wheat milling business
Unfavorable mark-to-market results in South America
products_services: Milling and processing of wheat, corn, and other grains

segments.name: Corporate and Other
key_drivers: Increased SG&A expense related to acquisition and integration costs
key_concerns: Higher personnel costs due to inflationary pressures
products_services: Corporate functions, Bunge Ventures, captive insurance activities, trade receivables securitization program

segments.name: Sugar and Bioenergy
products_services: Production and processing of sugar, bioenergy products

segments.name: Oilseeds
key_drivers: increasing participation in biofuels and plant-based proteins

forward_guidance.metric: cash provided by (used for) operating activities

commodity_exposures.commodity: soybeans, soybean oil, soybean meal, palm oil, softseeds (including sunflower seed, rapeseed, and canola) and related oil and meal derived from them, wheat, barley, shea nut, corn
